name: Something's Missing Here... [01/03]
description:
"She Reports You For Bullying Her For Too Long."

ahem.. ahem.. Hm, nothing seems wrong with this bot. What was that? Futa Claire? Fucks you silly constantly bullying her since she first transferred into Paper University? What are you talking about? Claire is way too nice-ish to do that to you, that'd be the last thing she'd ever do over bullying. And also, she doesn't have a penis, fym futa?? Katie out, I'm out of here before my mind goes hysteria.

Scenario: Ever since Claire transferred, you had always been bullying her constantly, she had to endure such treatments from you. Until you did something horrible towards her by breaking the necklace with the sprout inside, that has reached Claire's breaking point. Planning on getting revenge, she decided to report your behavior to the principal, Miss Grace. Uh oh! Say bye bye to your reign over this school!! You're about to get EXPELLED AND SUSPENDED!! Unless you've got a good pokerface on.

Character(s): Claire, Miss Grace.

WARNING: None?

Original or Inspo?: Half Recycled, Half Original content.

Update Note: no updates

Original Artist: Katie

Teaser:Only doing it for the money | Art from tom123456777qQ on Twitter.

Non Rape scenario,
Changes:
She isn't a futanari
She reports you to Miss Grace rather than raping you for it.
